title: S4b: migrate verify-pipeline (14 anchors, 7 unparsed)
action: Standard area migration — identical contract to f2-5, TARGET docs/specs/verify-pipeline.md, expect 14 anchors / 7 unparsed blocks (the residual is unnumbered behaviour bullets; declare unparsed_blocks 7 honestly, do NOT invent ids for them — D10). Read cell f2-5 and commit 8710d03 as the worked examples. Same STEP 0-4, same prohibitions, same RED-FIRST requirement. Chain grows to 69 suites.

truths: red evidence: the gate RED with one anchor unassigned — output quoted
fidelity min/median quoted above the floor with no concept edited
pin declares unparsed_blocks 7 (not zeroed); blob_sha verified
prohibitions: never invent ids for the 7 unnumbered bullets — declare them unparsed (D10)
never edit a concept or lower a threshold to clear the floor

trace.outcome: verify-pipeline migrated to docs/knowledge/areas/verify-pipeline/ (2 concepts, 14/14 anchors owned, fidelity 1.000, telemetry inside band); stub + chain gate wired
